source_issue.title: document feature of external links opening in new tab/window

summary_markdown:
# Issue Summary: External Links Opening in New Tab/Window

## What this issue is about
This issue discusses the feature that allows external links in Plone to open in a new tab or window. Contributors are exploring where this setting is located and advocating for better documentation as users find it unintuitive.

## What needs to be done
The primary goal is to improve documentation regarding this feature, specifically how to enable it in the Plone theming control panel. As of now, many users have difficulty finding it, and there are suggestions to make its location more intuitive.

## Helpful background
The feature can be located in the 'Theming Control Panel' under the 'Advanced' tab in the 'Theme base' sub-tab. Users have said it's not adequately documented, making it hard for content editors to know about its existence or how to use it.

## Good first steps
1. Verify the current location and functionality of the external link settings.
2. If comfortable, update or create documentation to clarify the steps to access and use this feature.
3. Consider including screenshots or a testing guide for implementation.
4. Reach out in the issue comments if you have questions or need clarification. Your contributions can help make Plone more user-friendly!
